default_policy: Existing non-Kenney visible assets are replacement candidates by default. Kenney assets may remain only after keep-review validation.

mappings.replacement_reason: Kenney bear remains acceptable only after strict keep-review; Meshy plush landmark is staged to improve playroom arena identity.
mappings.validation_result: Headless Godot import created valid GLB import metadata; generator now instantiates the Meshy plush landmark in home_yard_v3. Route clearance, screenshot review, and production acceptance remain pending.

mappings.replacement_reason: Non-Kenney visible playground landmark should be regenerated for current Meshy-first production gate.
Non-Kenney swing landmark needs current game-ready review and likely replacement.
Sandbox fossil is visible course identity and should meet the new production art bar.
Garden cluster needs route-readable silhouette and current provenance.
Toybox remains fallback while Meshy credits are available.
Custom visible attic trunk should be replaced with prompt-recorded Meshy source unless strict review passes.
mappings.validation_result: Headless Godot import created valid GLB import metadata; generator now instantiates the Meshy trunk in home_yard_v3. Route clearance, screenshot review, and production acceptance remain pending.

mappings.replacement_reason: Custom setpiece should be re-authored or strictly justified against current production gate.
mappings.validation_result: Headless Godot import created valid GLB and texture import files after stale import metadata was regenerated; generator now instantiates the Meshy GLB in home_yard_v3. Route clearance, screenshot review, and production acceptance remain pending.

mappings.replacement_reason: Prior Meshy output is not grandfathered without current prompt, budget, and camera validation.
Prior Meshy output must pass current low-poly and player-height readability gate.
